'''madhupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oathbreach|oathbreach]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-dh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oathbreach|oathbreach]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| madhupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mædhipith|mædhipith]] || [[word:mædhipij|mædhipij]] || [[word:mædhipish|mædhipish]] || [[word:mædhipi|mædhipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:madhudhuputh|madhudhuputh]] || [[word:madhudhupuj|madhudhupuj]] || [[word:madhudhupush|madhudhupush]] || [[word:madhudhupu|madhudhupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:madhuputh|madhuputh]] || [[word:madhupuj|madhupuj]] || [[word:madhupush|madhupush]] || [[word:madhupu|madhupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:madhufpufth|madhufpufth]] || [[word:madhufpufj|madhufpufj]] || [[word:madhufpufsh|madhufpufsh]] || [[word:madhufpuf|madhufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:madhuputhu|madhuputhu]] || [[word:madhupuju|madhupuju]] || [[word:madhupushu|madhupushu]] || [[word:madhupuku|madhupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:madhuputh|madhuputh]] || [[word:madhupuj|madhupuj]] || [[word:madhupush|madhupush]] || [[word:madhupu|madhupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:madhuputhul|madhuputhul]] || [[word:madhupujul|madhupujul]] || [[word:madhupushul|madhupushul]] || [[word:madhupukul|madhupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:madhupuuthuthu|madhupuuthuthu]] || [[word:madhupuujuju|madhupuujuju]] || [[word:madhupuushushu|madhupuushushu]] || [[word:madhupuuku|madhupuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:madhuputhun|madhuputhun]] || [[word:madhupujun|madhupujun]] || [[word:madhupushun|madhupushun]] || [[word:madhupukun|madhupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:madhuputhuoro|madhuputhuoro]] || [[word:madhupujuoro|madhupujuoro]] || [[word:madhupushuoro|madhupushuoro]] || [[word:madhupukuoro|madhupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5551a29}}
